# Buzztate

> Cross-platform listing localization for e-commerce sellers on Amazon, Shopify, and Etsy.

Buzztate is a SaaS tool that converts and localizes product listings across e-commerce platforms and languages. Sellers upload a CSV/TSV from one marketplace and download marketplace-ready files for international markets — not just translated, but fully adapted with local keywords, cultural tone, and platform-specific formatting.

## What Buzztate Does

- Converts listings between Amazon, Shopify, and Etsy formats
- Localizes product titles, descriptions, bullet points, tags, and backend keywords
- Generates missing fields automatically (e.g., creates 5 Amazon bullet points from an Etsy description)
- Enforces marketplace character limits and formatting rules
- Handles cultural adaptation: German compound nouns, Japanese keigo, formal address conventions

## Supported Platforms

- Amazon Seller Central (TSV/CSV flat file import/export)
- Shopify (CSV with SEO meta fields)
- Etsy (CSV with 13-tag optimization)

## Supported Markets

- Amazon Germany (.de) — German compound nouns, formal "Sie" address, metric conversion
- Amazon France (.fr) — Accent-correct keywords, elegant copy style
- Amazon Spain (.es) — European Spanish, benefit-driven descriptions
- Amazon Italy (.it) — Lifestyle-oriented, design emphasis
- Amazon Japan (.co.jp) — Keigo politeness, katakana brand names, exhaustive detail
- Shopify Markets — All major languages including German, French, Spanish, Italian, Japanese, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, Finnish, and more
- Etsy International — German, French, Spanish, Italian, Japanese, Portuguese, Dutch, Polish, Swedish, Danish, Norwegian, Finnish

## Pricing

- Free: 5 listings per month, 1 marketplace
- Plus: $49/month, unlimited listings (up to 200 per batch), all marketplaces

## How It Works

1. Export listings from your source marketplace (Amazon, Shopify, or Etsy)
2. Upload the CSV/TSV file to Buzztate
3. Select target marketplace and language
4. Download the localized, marketplace-ready file
5. Import into the target marketplace
